title: Coffee-side-table
description:
A handcrafted resin accent table designed to add a soft, luxurious statement to any modern home. Featuring elegant ivory marble-inspired resin waves, delicate gold detailing, and a sleek gold metal frame, each piece is handmade with care and has its own unique pattern.

Product Details

Material: Resin artwork top with gold metal frame
Finish: Glossy resin finish
Colour: Ivory, soft beige, white and gold
Style: Modern luxe / minimal / elegant
Use: Accent table, side table, coffee corner table, bedroom table, living room décor
Handmade: Each piece is individually created, so patterns may slightly vary
dimensions: Made to order in your preferred size — contact us for custom dimensions and pricing.
